title: lepidium oblongum
intro: Lepidium oblongum, also known as Chinese cress, is a type of annual plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium oblongum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide anti-aging properties. Lepidium oblongum can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a culinary ingredient in various Asian dishes.
